DISCOVERY 301, AFTER HEARING, PLAINTIFF PETER HWANG'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING THAT REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS BE ADMITTED; AN ORDER COMPELLING AND AWARDING MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST (DEFENDANT FLORES) IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF RENEWING THE MOTION. THERE WAS NO VALID PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO THIS DEFENDANT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

DISCOVERY 301, AFTER HEARING, PLAINTIFF PETER HWANG'S MOTION FOR ORDER DEEMING THAT REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS AGAINST (DEFENDANT SPRAGUE) BE ADMITTED; AN ORDER COMPELLING AND AWARDING MONETARY SANCTIONS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF RENEWING THE MOTION. PARTIES WERE ENCOURAGED BY THE COURT TO MEET AND CONFER. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-03-2011 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: N. Bautista ; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Peter Hwang, is present.
Attorney, Kavita Sharma, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Al Sprague and Jessica Flores, is present.
Attorney, Umung Varma, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Tom Drohan, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAR-07-2011 is vacated.

Ntc And Motion For Order Deeming That Request For Admissions Be Admitted ; Order Compelling And Awarding Monetary Sanctions (Deft Flores)
Off Calendar Feb-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. KAVITA SHARMA OF THE STEVEN MACDONALD & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 956-6488 X22 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
AL SPRAGUE, TEL. NO. 939-5519. DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF PETER HWANG'S Motion For Order Deeming That Request For Admissions Be Admitted; An Order Compelling And Awarding Monetary Sanctions against (Defendant Flores) is denied without prejudice of renewing the motion. There was no valid Proof of service as to this defendant. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)

Ntc And Motion For Order Deeming That Request For Admissions (Deft Sprague) Be Admitted ; Order Compelling And Awarding Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. KAVITA SHARMA OF THE STEVEN MACDONALD & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 956-6488 X22 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
AL SPRAGUE, TEL. NO. 939-5519. DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF PETER HWANG'S Motion For Order Deeming That Request For Admissions against (Defendant Sprague) Be Admitted; An Order Compelling And Awarding Monetary Sanctions is denied without prejudice of renewing the motion. Parties were encouraged by the court to meet and confer. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)
